changelog:
CHANGELOG - TCT LABEL ERP

============================================================
Phien ban 1.2.1 - 06/07/2026
============================================================

- Cai thien hieu nang khi ADD va TAO TEM, giam hien tuong ERP bi khung/giat khi tao nhieu tem.
- Toi uu luu danh sach ADD doi in: khong ghi Pending_Tem.xlsx lien tuc tung thao tac.
- Bo xu ly AutoFitColumns nang khi ghi Excel, giup tao va luu file TD Gang nhanh hon voi file thang nhieu dong.
- Toi uu backup khi ghi file, han che quet thu muc backup qua nhieu lan.
- Toi uu DataGridView khi cap nhat danh sach da tao, giam nhap nhay giao dien.
- Nang cap TCT Data Converter de chuyen tab Label/Converter muot hon.
- Converter khong restart watcher moi lan bam lai tab neu cau hinh khong thay doi.
- Them DoubleBuffered cho Converter de giao dien on dinh hon khi resize/chuyen tab.
- Luu tu dong cau hinh Converter vao ConverterSettings.json.
- Tu dong nap lai TXT Folder, CSV Save Folder va Ten ban in khi mo ERP lan sau.
- Neu duong dan da luu khong con ton tai, Converter chi canh bao nhe trong Activity Log va khong crash.
- Nang cap o Ten ban in thanh ComboBox, co the go tay hoac chon tu danh sach.
- ComboBox Ten ban in tu dong lay goi y tu lich su da convert va thu muc Data\PrintTemplates.
- Ho tro danh sach template gom file .btw, .xlsx, .csv.
- Khi chon/nhap Ten ban in, ERP tu luu lua chon cho lan sau.
- Giu nguyen logic convert TXT sang CSV hien tai.
- Cap nhat huong dan su dung va huong dan tao ban update moi chi tiet hon.
- Bo sung vi tri sua AppVersion trong Form1.cs.
- Bo sung vi tri sua AssemblyVersion va AssemblyFileVersion trong AssemblyInfo.cs.
- Bo sung huong dan tao ZIP/Version.json bang ReleaseBuilder.
- Bo sung cach lay link raw GitHub va sua downloadUrl dung cach.
- Bo sung checklist kiem tra khi ERP khong bao update.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.1.2 - 27/06/2026
============================================================

- Ban test Auto Update bang Version.json + ZIP + UpdateService.exe.
- Kiem tra luong tai update, SHA256, backup, giai nen va mo lai ERP.
- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra cap nhat de test update thu cong.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.1.1 - 26/06/2026
============================================================

- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra he thong.
- Them nut Yeu cau key trong bang Thong tin ban quyen va form Kich hoat ban quyen.
- Them o Nhap key va nut Kich hoat ngay trong bang Thong tin ban quyen.
- Tao file YeuCauKey_TCT_Label_ERP_...txt de khach gui cho chu so huu cap license.
- Them thong tin Zalo va tai khoan ngan hang cua chu so huu vao file yeu cau key.
- Them menu Ho tro > Kiem tra cap nhat de check update thu cong.
- Them bang kiem tra OK / Canh bao / Loi kem goi y xu ly.
- Them menu Ho tro > Tao goi ho tro de gom log, cai dat va thong tin may.
- Sua license luu tai ProgramData de chay Admin va chay thuong dung chung ban quyen.
- Sua quyen file license.dat de giam loi Access denied.
- Sua dieu kien canh bao trung dong: chi canh bao khi dong ADD giong toan bo thong tin tem.
- Doi title phan mem sang TcT LaBel - TD Gang phien ban ...
- Chinh bang goi y SAP nam ngay duoi chan o Sap Code / Ten LK.
- Chinh cum nut du lieu/xlsx/upload gon hon, nut khoa bang thanh icon nho.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.1.0 - 25/06/2026
============================================================

- Them he thong ban quyen Trial / Customer / Owner.
- Them form kich hoat ban quyen va hien thi Ma may.
- Them tool GenerateLicense.exe cho chu so huu.
- Tach Customer_Package va Owner_Tools de tranh gui nham tool cap license.
- Them menu Cai dat de chinh Output, Backup, so ngay giu backup.
- Them menu Nhat ky de xem log theo ngay.
- Them backup tu dong khi ghi MasterData va TD Gang.
- Them log thao tac quan trong.
- Them co che luu tam danh sach tem dang cho Tao Tem.
- File TD Gang tu dong tach theo thang: TD Gang thang MM-yyyy.xlsx.
- Them cot TT cho cac bang hien thi.
- Them tim kiem Ctrl + F trong GridViewerForm theo Sap Code hoac L0.

============================================================
Phien ban 1.0.0
============================================================

- Nen tang ERP tao tem TD Gang.
- Quan ly MasterData Sap Code / Ten LK / Vendor / PartNumber.
- ADD danh sach tem va Tao Tem ra file Excel.
